description: A sequel to Chrono Trigger where Serge, a young man from a coastal village, discovers he exists in two parallel timelines and must save both worlds from the cataclysmic Event Horizon.

worlds.name: Home (Linear World)
worlds.description: The world where Serge grew up - a peaceful coastal village, El Nido

key_events.name: The Disappearing Girl
key_events.description: Kid appears at Serge's home and asks him to investigate the Dead Sea.

key_events.name: Kidnapping at the Beach
key_events.description: Serge is kidnapped by Lynx and taken to the Dead Sea.

key_events.name: Rescue at the Dead Sea
key_events.description: Serge and Kid rescue Radius and use the dimension tube to escape.

key_events.name: Viper Manor
key_events.description: The party infiltrates Viper Manor to rescue the Dragon God.

worlds.name: Another World (Anti-Linear World)
worlds.description: The parallel world where Serge died as a child - now ruled by Lynx

key_events.name: Waking in Another World
key_events.description: Serge wakes up in the world where he died as a child.

key_events.name: Meeting Guinevere
key_events.description: Serge meets Guinevere, who helps him understand the two timelines.

key_events.name: Confronting Lynx
key_events.description: The party confronts Lynx in Fort Dragonia.

story_arcs.name: The Dead Sea Incident
story_arcs.description: Serge investigates the mysterious Dead Sea and discovers the existence of parallel worlds.

story_arcs.name: The Dragon God Hunt
story_arcs.description: The party travels across El Nido to collect the Dragon's tears and summon the Dragon God.

story_arcs.name: The Frozen Flame
story_arcs.description: The party seeks the Frozen Flame to power the time-traveling device.

story_arcs.name: Confronting FATE
story_arcs.description: The revelation that FATE, the computer from 2400 AD, has been manipulating history.

story_arcs.name: The Ultimate Choice
story_arcs.description: Serge must choose between saving one world or merging them together.

endings.name: Divine Wind Fall
endings.description: Defeat the Time Devourer and destroy FATE.
endings.outcome: The worlds are saved, but the timeline is altered

endings.name: The Frozen Flame
endings.description: Use the Frozen Flame to restore the timeline.
endings.outcome: Timeline is reset to before Lavos awakened

endings.name: Dimensional merge
endings.outcome: A new unified world is created

character_arcs.arc: The silent protagonist who discovers he is the key to saving both timelines. He struggles with his identity and the choice between two worlds.
A thief seeking revenge for her mother's death. She struggles with the truth about her origins and her relationship with Serge.
A mysterious woman from another dimension who guides Serge. Her true identity is revealed as Princess Elise of Guardia.
A playful yet mysterious member of the party. She is actually a member of the Demi-Human race sent to observe the timeline.
The main antagonist who was once Serge's friend. He seeks to destroy FATE but uses questionable methods.
Leader of the Deists and father to several party members. He seeks to restore his family honor.
An anthropomorphic frog who is actually Glenn, Frog's descendant from Chrono Trigger.
A veteran soldier seeking to rescue his daughter. He carries the guilt of the war.
A young girl with psychic abilities who joins the party to find her missing father.
A doctor who joined the resistance against the Dragon God. He seeks to cure the spread of the status effects.
An alien who crash-landed on Earth. Joins the party to find a way home.
A shape-shifting creature who can transform into other party members. Her true form is unknown.

branching_decisions.description: Serge's choice in the Dead Sea
branching_decisions.choice: Escape with Kid or stay and fight
Summon or destroy the Dragon God
Let Harle go or bring her along

factions.name: Deists
factions.description: Worshippers of the Dragon God, led by Viper

factions.name: Dragons
factions.description: Ancient beings who serve as guardians

factions.name: FATE
factions.description: The governing AI from the future

factions.name: Resistance
factions.description: Those who oppose the Dragon God's rule

important_locations.name: Dead Sea
important_locations.description: An inland sea that connects the two dimensions. It appears differently in each world.

important_locations.name: Viper Manor
important_locations.description: The headquarters of the Deists, located in the mountains.

important_locations.name: Fort Dragonia
important_locations.description: The ancient fort built by the Dragons, now used by FATE.

important_locations.name: Hermes Village
important_locations.description: A peaceful village hidden in the mountains, home to the goddess.

important_locations.name: Temporal Rift
important_locations.description: The space between dimensions where FATE resides.
